items.name_en: 🆕 M12656 Green! BRAZZA Wallet. Crafted from Monogram Heritage canvas, this Brazza wallet showcases Pharrell Williams' fresh take on the iconic Monogram pattern. Interwoven textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée label highlight classic Damier elements, paired with multiple card slots and compartments for a functional long design.
items.name_cn:
🆕 M12656 Green! BRAZZA Wallet. Crafted from Monogram Heritage canvas, this Brazza wallet showcases Pharrell Williams' fresh take on the iconic Monogram pattern. Interwoven textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée label highlight classic Damier elements, paired with multiple card slots and compartments for a functional long design.
19 x 2 x 10 cm
(H x W x L)

items.name_en: 🆕 【 M80334 Hardware Green】This horizontal Zippy Wallet is made from Monogram Eclipse canvas with bronze-toned hardware. Inspired by the traditional vertical Zippy wallet, it features a horizontal orientation for enhanced practicality. This all-zippered wallet design includes a main compartment with a zippered central wallet, six card slots on each side, and two flat pockets for bills. Dimensions: 21 x 2.5 x 10 cm C

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M12635 Embossed】This compact Victor wallet is made of Monogram Shadow calfskin, adorned with delicate Monogram embossed patterns, exuding a 'low-key luxury' temperament. The interior features a practical divider, a zippered pocket, a pocket for bills and receipts, and five card slots. The flip cover features a snap button design and is adorned with the Louis Vuitton logo. 11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
items.name_cn: 【Exclusive Real Shot M12635 Embossed】This compact Victor wallet is made of Monogram Shadow calfskin, adorned with delicate Monogram embossed patterns, exuding a 'low-key luxury' temperament. The flip cover features a snap button design and is adorned with the Louis Vuitton logo. 11.5 x 9 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M69831 Black! The Aerogram Long Wallet reinterprets traditional men's accessories with a contemporary minimalist design. Crafted from microfiber black calfskin, it is as soft as the historic Aerogram, featuring a discreet black metal LV logo and a practical detachable wrist strap. Generous capacity with a fan-fold main compartment, 12 credit card slots, and an extra flap pocket for various items. Size: 20 x 11 x 2.5 cm.

items.name_en: This Zippy Vertical wallet is made of Monogram coated canvas and calfskin, embellished with colorful semi-abstract face patterns. It features a calfskin lining and a silver all-zip design. This exceptionally practical wallet has 12 card slots and multiple compartments, including a zip pocket for coins.
